name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate dunning emails instead of manual tracking and follow-up via email.
problem_solved: Late payments due to lack of follow-up on outstanding invoices.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Late payments due to lack of follow-up on outstanding invoices.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate dunning emails instead of manual tracking and follow-up via email.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking and follow-up via email.

one_liner: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate dunning emails instead of manual tracking and follow-up via email.
